news.paragraph: Zoom is navigating a transition period marked by new leadership and a strategic focus on AI integration. While the CEO's vision for AI-driven workweek shifts provides a long-term narrative, recent headwinds include an insider reducing their stake by 100% and the stock underperforming the broader market. Traders should monitor how these internal changes and the ongoing AI push influence future volatility.
headlines: This Zoom Communications Insider Reduced Their Stake By 100%
